Genovese crime family Springfield factio.description: The Springfield faction of the Genovese crime family is an Italian-American organized crime group based in Springfield, Massachusetts. It controls illegal activities such as racketeering, gambling, loansharking, and extortion. Founded in the 1920s, it has been led by caporegimes including Salvatore Cufari, Francesco Scibelli, Adolfo Bruno, and Anthony Arillotta. The faction remains active as of the present.

descriptions: The Springfield faction is a sub-unit of the Genovese crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Springfield faction of the Genovese crime family is a group of Italian-American mobsters who control organized crime activities in the Springfield, Massachusetts area.

Los Lagartos.description: Los Lagartos is a narcoterrorist cartel originating from Guayaquil, Ecuador. It is composed of smaller criminal branches and operates primarily in Guayaquil, with suspected presence in other coastal cities. The group is considered the second most powerful criminal organization in Ecuador after Los Choneros, with whom they are in a violent territorial dispute. They are involved in international drug trafficking, micro-trafficking, extortion, and robbery, and have ties to the Jalisco New Generation Cartel.

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Lagartos as occasional enemies of Los Chone Killers.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros , Latin Kings , Los Lagartos (en ocasiones)

descriptions: Los Lagartos is listed as a rival of Los Choneros in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Lagartos, Los Lobos, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers

descriptions: Los Lagartos are enemies of Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Lagartos

descriptions: Los Lagartos provide logistics, drug storage, and security services to CJNG in exchange for payment.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lagartos prestan servicios logísticos, de acopio de droga y seguridad a traficantes como los del Cartel de Jalisco Nueva Generación de México que paga con dinero, armas, heroína o productos para la venta local.

descriptions: Los Lagartos are the fiercest rivals of Los Choneros, competing for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: Son los máximos rivales acérrimos de Los Choneros con quienes se disputan el control de territorios y de plazas

descriptions: Lobos is a faction within the Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: the Lobos (The wolves) were established in Laredo

descriptions: Lobos listed as ally of Kings Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Lobos

descriptions: Lobos is listed as an ally of the Rebels in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Satan's Choice , Kings Crew Motorcycle Club , Lobos and, later, the Hells Angels

descriptions: Hells Angels and East Bay Dragons have a mutual friendship and socialize together.
edges.evidence_quote: Tobie Levingston, who formed the black motorcycle club East Bay Dragons MC, wrote in his book that he and Barger have a long-lasting friendship and that the Hells Angels and Dragons have a mutual friendship and hang out and ride together.

descriptions: D-Company clashed with and eliminated the Pathan gang leadership, becoming dominant.
edges.evidence_quote: This ultimately led them to clash with the Pathan gang, the most influential gang in Mumbai at the time. By 1986, D-Company had eliminated most of the Pathan gang leadership, emerging as the dominant gang in Mumbai.

descriptions: Parrello and Piccolo were opposing sides in the Seconda faida di Palmi.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida di Palmi , esplosa il 25 settembre 1986 tra i Parrello e i Piccolo con l'omicidio del capocosca Gaetano Parrello

descriptions: East Side White Pride allegedly had ties to WAR.
edges.evidence_quote: three white Aryan supremacists who were members of East Side White Pride, which allegedly had ties to WAR

descriptions: Carderplanet succeeded Counterfeit Library.
edges.evidence_quote: counterfeitlibrary.com , which was run by Brett Johnson and would be followed up by carderplanet.com owned by Dmitry Golubov

descriptions: ShadowCrew emerged from Counterfeit Library.
edges.evidence_quote: ShadowCrew emerged early in 2002 from another underground site, counterfeitlibrary.com , which was run by Brett Johnson

descriptions: Outlaws pressured Sinners to show allegiance, leading to conflict and disbandment.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1992, around forty members of the Outlaws crashed a party being held by the Milwaukee-based Sinners Motorcycle Club and thereafter began pressuring the Sinners to wear an "A.O.A." patch on their vests to show allegiance to the Outlaws.

descriptions: Hells Angels founder broke away from Pissed Off Bastards, indicating a split.
edges.evidence_quote: Otto Friedli, a World War II veteran, is credited with starting the club after breaking from the Pissed Off Bastards motorcycle club over a feud with a rival gang.

Free Souls Motorcycle Club.description: Outlaw motorcycle club formed in Eugene, Oregon in 1969. Chapters exist in Oregon, Washington, Germany, and Australia. The club's center patch features an ankh over a motorcycle wheel on handlebars, with blue and white colors.

edges.evidence_quote: Some other Filipino gangs such as the Demonios and Diablos (not the Mexican gang of the same name) claim their roots to Satanas, having originated amongst second generation STS members and younger siblings of individuals who were members of STS; the founders of many other Filipino American gangs were originally members of Satanas.

descriptions: Diablos originated from Satanas members.

Kuratong Baleleng.description: Organized crime syndicate in the Philippines, originally an anti-communist vigilante group founded in 1986 by the Botanical Youth Club. Based in Mindanao, it engaged in kidnapping, drug trafficking, extortion, and other crimes. Gained nationwide attention after a 1995 shootout with police. Remnants remain active across the Philippines.

descriptions: AFP handpicked Kuratong Baleleng's first leader, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Its first leader was Octavio 'Ongkoy' Parojinog, handpicked by the Armed Forces of the Philippines

descriptions: Botanical Youth Club founded Kuratong Baleleng.
edges.evidence_quote: The group was originally established in 1986 by the Botanical Youth Club

descriptions: Kuratong Baleleng had ties to Maguindanao guerrillas, leading to Muslim clans joining.
edges.evidence_quote: ties to the Maguindanao guerrillas led Muslim Maguindanaon clans to join

descriptions: PACC killed 11 Kuratong Baleleng members in 1995, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: 11 members of Kuratong Baleleng were killed by the forces of the Presidential Anti-Crime Commission

descriptions: KLA members joined the Kosovo Protection Corps after disbandment.
edges.evidence_quote: the KLA was officially disbanded and thousands of its members entered the Kosovo Protection Corps

descriptions: Former KLA members later worked for the Kosovo Protection Corps.
edges.evidence_quote: The newspaper identified two of the three KLA members as Sadik Chuflaj and his son Valon Chuflaj, who according to the newspaper then worked for the Kosovo Protection Corps.

edges.target: Al-Qaeda in the Lands Beyond the Sahel
descriptions: Al-Qaeda in the Lands Beyond the Sahel was a former affiliate of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Qaeda in the Lands Beyond the Sahel (inactive since 2015)

Lebanese mafia.description: The Lebanese mafia is a colloquial term for organized crime groups originating from Lebanon. Active globally due to the Lebanese diaspora, they are involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, extortion, and money laundering. Key regions include Lebanon's Beqaa Valley, Australia, Canada, and the Triple Frontier in South America. The groups are often structured around extended crime families and have been active since the mid-20th century.

descriptions: The American Mafia is allied with the Lebanese mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... African-American mob , Armenian mafia , Chaldean mafia , Corsican mafia , Dixie Mafia , Greek mafia , Jewish-American mob , Lebanese mafia , Mexican Mafia , Russian mafia , Serbian mafia , various motorcycle gangs (such as the Hells Angels , Outlaws , and Pagan's ) , various street gangs (such as the Bloods , Crips , and Latin Kings )

'Ndrina Carelli.description: The 'Ndrina Carelli is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, based in Corigliano Calabro, Italy. It operates primarily in Germany, involved in drug trafficking in cities such as Bochum, Münster, Frankfurt, Berlin, and Munich. The clan is allied with the zingari of Lauropoli and the Critelli of Cariati. Notable member Santo Carelli was sentenced to life imprisonment for murder in 2010.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Carelli is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Carelli è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Corigliano Calabro.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Carelli is allied with the Critelli di Cariati.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con gli zingari di Lauropoli e con i Critelli di Cariati.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Carelli is allied with the Zingari di Lauropoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con gli zingari di Lauropoli e con i Critelli di Cariati.

descriptions: Westmob associates with Oakdale Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: Westmob is known to associate with the Oakdale Mob and Sunnydale Gangsters.

descriptions: Serraino and Nicolò were both implicated in Operation Araba Fenice.
edges.evidence_quote: I "colletti bianchi" arrestati sarebbero riconducibili alle famiglie Rosmini , Latella , Serraino, Audino e Nicolò .

descriptions: Latella allied with Nicolò in 2013 to control construction.
edges.evidence_quote: the Latella 'ndrina, together with the Rosmini, Serraino, Audino, and Nicolò 'ndrine, formed an alliance to control the construction sector

Taliban (gang).description: The Taliban is a Kenyan criminal organization based in Nairobi slums, primarily recruiting from the Luo tribe. It emerged as an offshoot of the Baghdad Boys around 2001 and is led by Joash Oluande. The group is involved in providing security at bus stops and public transportation for a fee, and has been in conflict with the Mungiki over control of transport routes and illegal alcohol levies. It has political ties to Raila Odinga's Orange Democratic Movement.

descriptions: Taliban Gang is listed as a rival of 39ers gang in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Taliban Gang

descriptions: Gerace and Italiano were opposing sides in the Faida di Gioia Tauro.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Gioia Tauro, tra i Gerace e gli Italiano.

descriptions: Road Knights and Damned were at war in the late 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the late 1980s, the Road Knights became involved in a war with the Damned which resulted in several violent incidents.

descriptions: The infobox lists CWS as an ally of the Birmingham Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Elephant and Castle Mob and Hoxton Gang , CWS

descriptions: CWS is listed as an ally of Peckham Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: CWS, T-Block, ABM (All Bout Money), Firehouse Crew, OTB, Wooly Road Youngers

descriptions: Satan's Syndicate merged into Black Pistons by patching over to become a chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: On March 5, 2002, the Satan's Syndicate biker club in Columbus, Ohio "patched over" to become the first Black Pistons chapter in the United States.

descriptions: The Ramashish Koeri gang cooperated with these four other gangs in committing murders.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang, along with four other caste-based gangs led by Ghamari Karwar, Rambachan Yadav, Triveni Kahar, and Gaurik was responsible for over hundred murders in the Kaimur region.

descriptions: Dödspatrullen and Shottaz have been in a gang war since 2015, resulting in multiple deaths.
edges.evidence_quote: Dödspatrullen has been in a gang war with Shottaz, another Swedish Somali criminal organization originating from Rinkeby, since 2015.

descriptions: Santo Trafficante Sr. joined Antinori's organization and cooperated to expand Bolita games.
edges.evidence_quote: Antinori took notice of Santo Trafficante and invited him into his organization and together they expanded the Bolita games across the state of Florida.

descriptions: IS-AP is an affiliate of Islamic State.
edges.evidence_quote: Islamic State – Azerbaijan Province (IS-AP) emerged in 2019 and operates in Azerbaijan.

descriptions: IS-AP recruited from IS-CP.
edges.evidence_quote: Its adherents were previously recruited by both the Islamic State – Caucasus Province (IS-CP) and Islamic State – Khorasan Province (ISIS-K).

descriptions: IS-AP recruited from ISIS-K.
edges.evidence_quote: Its adherents were previously recruited by both the Islamic State – Caucasus Province (IS-CP) and Islamic State – Khorasan Province (ISIS-K).

descriptions: White Fence and El Hoyo Maravilla have a long-standing feud since the 1930s.
edges.evidence_quote: The rivalry between the gang and another Hispanic gang, El Hoyo Maravilla, is one of the longest, ongoing feuds in all of Los Angeles, a rivalry going back to the 1930s.

descriptions: White Tigers fought turf wars with Green Dragons.
edges.evidence_quote: Throughout the 80s, the gang was often engaged in bloody turf wars with other Queens gangs, such as the younger Green Dragons.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Orchard Park Trailblazers , Ashmont, Mt. Pleasant, Johnston Rd. Lenox Street Boys , Heath st

Clan Russo di Nola.description: Camorra clan operating in Nola, Italy, founded by brothers Pasquale and Salvatore Russo in the 1980s. Originally lieutenants of Carmine Alfieri, they replaced the Alfieri clan. Despite arrests of top bosses, the clan remains active under a new generation and has expanded alliances, including with the Mazzarella clan of Naples.

descriptions: Clan Cava has alliances with Clan Russo and Clan Fabbrocino in the Nola area.
edges.evidence_quote: Ancora oggi, quello schieramento di parte si rispecchia nelle alleanze che i Cava hanno con altri gruppi criminali dell' agro nolano come i clan Russo di Nola e Fabbrocino

descriptions: Members of Clan Cava, Clan Moccia, and Clan Russo were arrested together for usury and extortion, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: In data 17 giugno 2011 ... sottoponevano a fermo di Polizia Giudiziaria 5 pregiudicati esponenti dei clan Cava di Quindici , Moccia di Afragola e Russo di Nola , ritenuti responsabili dei reati di usura ed estorsione aggravata

descriptions: Fabbrocino was historically strongly linked to the Russo clan.
edges.evidence_quote: un tempo fortemente legata ai clan Cava e Russo

descriptions: The Russo brothers were lieutenants of Carmine Alfieri and later replaced the Alfieri clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I Russo, già luogotenenti di Carmine Alfieri hanno, dopo la sua fine, sostituito il clan Alfieri , in cui avevano militato.

descriptions: Clan Russo fought a war against Clan Faiano.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan è stato protagonista di una guerra che li ha visti misurarsi con il clan "Faiano"

descriptions: The Russo clan planned to expand into territory formerly controlled by the Fabbrocino clan.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan è gestito dalla nuova generazione dei Russo, che avrebbe cominciato a seguire un piano per allargarsi fino a San Giuseppe Vesuviano , una volta territorio del clan Fabbrocino.

descriptions: Clan Russo is allied with Clan Misso through marriage and alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: L'ultimo dei figli di Mimì, Salvatore, ha sposato la figlia di Ciro Lepre , detto 'o sceriffo , il boss del Cavone, anch'egli alleato di Misso.

descriptions: A member of Clan Russo is affiliated with Clan Puccinelli.
edges.evidence_quote: Uno di loro risulta affiliato al clan Puccinelli di Soccavo

descriptions: The new leadership of the Russo clan formed an alliance with the Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: La nuova gestione del clan ha anche stretto un'alleanza con il clan Mazzarella di Napoli.

descriptions: Clan Russo and Clan Moccia plotted together with Clan Cava against Antonio Guerriero.
edges.evidence_quote: Stando a quanto dichiarato dal pentito di Nola Ciro Di Domenico, a tramare contro Guerriero furono tre clan (i Cava, i Russo e i Moccia ) .
